segments.text: 79%, 84%—the damage is building moment by moment, but this down smash still won't take them!
segments.original_text: 79%84%刻一刻とパーセントは溜まっていきますがこの下スマッシュまだ耐える

segments.text: 108%—that's already in kill range for Puff!
segments.original_text: 108.0%プリンにとってはもうデッドゾーンでしょう

segments.text: Not letting them recover! 122.6%, 125.7%—the percent keeps stacking with every jump!
segments.original_text: ライン回復を許さない122.6%125.7%パーセントが溜まるジャンプ

full_text: 79%, 84%—the damage is building moment by moment, but this down smash still won't take them! 108%—that's already in kill range for Puff! Not letting them recover! 122.6%, 125.7%—the percent keeps stacking with every jump!
